title: Prologue
overview: 35 years after the first demon invasion, a new menace threatens Tokyo.

title: Armor
overview: Gai goes after the Troopers and their weapons, clashing with the DST as another demon assault begins.

title: Link
overview: Musashi's brother barges into the DST base, determined to become a Samurai Trooper himself.

title: Combat
overview: A mysterious ex-Trooper bursts onto the scene, and he`s nursing a grudge against Ryusei.

title: Sadness
overview: Ramaga himself enters the fray, dominating the Troopers with demonic power.

title: Restart
overview: A shocking revelation and the loss of a teammate leave the Troopers reeling.

title: Memory
overview: The Samurai Troopers embark on a quest for the Mirror of Supremacy.

title: Again
overview: The Troopers quest for a weapon to defeat Ramaga puts them on the trail of an old ally: the tiger White Blaze.

title: Outbreak
overview: As Ramaga's deadline approaches, Mirei uncovers a threat from within.

title: Sacrifice
overview: Ramaga takes Mirei hostage and demands that the Troopers duel his warriors if they want to see her again.

title: Return
overview: With newfound strength, the Troopers confront Ramaga. But are they playing into the demon emperor's hands?

title: Epilogue
overview: Heroes unite to put an end to Ramaga's ambition, but what will victory cost them?
